queue.task: Review Apr 23 results, set direction: neural-net README + CI fix, HenryDB depth, blog
queue.summary: Reviewed state: neural-net CI has 70/2123 failures on remote (Node 18/20/22). Local is behind remote by 439 files. Need to pull origin/main and diagnose CI failures - likely Node version compat issues. Queue is solid, no changes needed.

queue.goal: Fix neural-net GitHub Actions CI (150+ consecutive failures)
queue.summary: Diagnosed CI: 70/2123 failures. Root causes: (1) missing exports in metrics.js/contrastive.js/data-aug.js/knowledge-distillation.js, (2) MoE forward/backward bugs, (3) misc TypeErrors. Filled 3 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Pull origin/main, diagnose and fix missing exports (metrics.js, contrastive.js, data-augmentation.js, knowledge-distillation.js)
queue.summary: Fixed missing exports in 5 source files: metrics.js (6 functions), contrastive.js (2 exports + ntXentLoss pairing fix), data-augmentation.js (7 functions), quantization.js (6 functions + array API), regularization.js (7 functions). Tests: 1242/1305 pass (was ~2053/2123 CI). 63 remaining failures in MoE, VAE, early stopping, grad check.

queue.task: Fix MoE forward/backward bugs (predicted.sub not a function, undefined probs)
queue.summary: Rewrote MoE with correct constructor signature and API (routing stats, gate probs, load balance loss). Added Dense.update null guard. All 16 MoE tests pass.

queue.task: Fix remaining CI failures, run full suite locally, push and verify CI green
queue.summary: Fixed all remaining CI failures: VAE rewrite (Matrix-aware, train/generate/interpolate), data-augmentation (Matrix support), quantization (scalar API), early-stopping (minDelta), MoE (proper softmax Jacobian gate gradient, batch gradient accumulation, gate.probs). Full suite: 1305/1305 pass locally. Pushed to origin/main.

queue.task: Git push, dashboard health check
queue.summary: Git pushed both repos. Neural-net CI re-pushed with src/ test fixes. HenryDB: 4257/4288 pass (28 failures, not today focus). Neural-net: 2323/2324 pass locally (1 flaky SOM test).

queue.task: Reflect on CI fix, assess neural-net README accuracy
queue.summary: README mostly accurate (168 src, ~27K lines). Updated test file count mentally to 192. Key learning from CI fix: tests written by different sessions diverged on APIs — MoE constructor, ntXentLoss return type, VAE encode/decode signatures all conflicted. Fix required proper gradient computation (softmax Jacobian) not just API mapping.
README mostly up-to-date already. Filled 1 BUILD task for stats update.

queue.task: Update README stats (192 test files, 2300+ tests) and verify CI badge
queue.summary: Updated README to 192 test files, 2300+ tests, ~27K LOC. Previous CI push passed! Pushed README update.

queue.task: Git push, dashboard regen, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Knowledge captured: MoE gradient learning scratch note. Git pushed both repos. CI green.

queue.task: Assess HenryDB priorities: trigger parser bug, depth work
queue.summary: HenryDB has 28 failures across 8 suites: CREATE TABLE AS SELECT, Differential Fuzzer, E-commerce E2E, EXPLAIN ANALYZE, Full-text Search, PersistentDatabase, Regression Tests, SQL Compat. These are deeper bugs — not quick fixes. Recommend a focused depth session on HenryDB: run the differential fuzzer failures first (highest signal), then persistent db issues.

queue.goal: HenryDB depth: trigger parser SQL formatting bug + test hardening
queue.summary: Planned 4 BUILD tasks for HenryDB depth: differential fuzzer fixes, persistent DB, EXPLAIN ANALYZE / CTAS, and remaining failures.

queue.task: Fix differential fuzzer failures (HenryDB vs SQLite divergences)
queue.summary: Fixed CRITICAL join bug in volcano-planner: extractEquiJoinKeys was swapping build/probe keys when ON clause column order differed from table order. All joins with qualified names (d.id = e.dept_id where d is the right table) were producing cross joins. Fix: check which table each qualified column belongs to. PersistentDB and fuzzer tests fixed. 26 failures remain (was 28).

queue.task: Fix PersistentDatabase test failures
queue.summary: Already fixed by the join bug fix in T11.

queue.task: Fix EXPLAIN ANALYZE and CREATE TABLE AS SELECT bugs
queue.summary: Fixed: (1) float division 10.0/3 via isFloat flag propagation in tokenizer→parser→evaluator, (2) CASE WHEN NULL/0/false via evalExpr default truthiness, (3) LIMIT 0 via null check, (4) tokenize import in expression-evaluator, (5) e2e fulltext search. 28→11 failures (all in one regression suite). Remaining: NULL IS NULL, boolean in SELECT, NATURAL JOIN, SUM empty — deeper parser/evaluator issues.

queue.task: Fix remaining test failures (E-commerce E2E, Full-text Search, SQL Compat, Regression)
Git push, dashboard regen
Mid-day reflection: depth check, learning gate

queue.goal: Neural-net: normalize property naming across layers

queue.task: Git push, dashboard regen
Evening direction: explore priorities
Monkey-lang codebase audit: what needs attention after 3 weeks
Vectorized execution strategies for HenryDB
Final git push, knowledge capture, daily log summary
